subcodes.first_line: O thou whose senses are perfumed by the sweet-scented breezes of God! I humbly supplicate the Most Glorious Kingdom, raising my hands in prayer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تعطر مشامه من نفحات الله انى اتضرع منکرا الی الملکوت الابهی و باسطا اکف
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
